programmes.show_description: History Repeating. Danielle has bought her childhood family home, but not the idyllic place she remembers growing up in due to some terrifying paranormal encounters. S6, Ep8
Lost Child Of Anglesey. Lorna, Jay and family got more than bargained for when they moved into their Anglesey home the locals call 'The Haunted House'. S6, Ep9
Pennies From Heaven. Jon and Donna experience dark shadows, an oppressive atmosphere and pennies randomly appearing in their Yorkshire home. Is money the root of all evil? S6, Ep10
Teleshopping.
In Leeds, Drew and Tee visit two dealers who have been collecting since 1971. Drew uncovers an old industrial stool and some ceramic hand moulds. S14, Ep22
Drew and Tee are excited by the items on offer at the largest antiques market in Italy. And, they visit a picturesque town in Spain to look at a fascinating collection. S14, Ep23
A Cumbrian woman whose past has been heavily entwined with Spain decides to up sticks and start a new life in vibrant Barcelona. She has £500,000 to spend on a coastal home. S6, Ep9

Pepper Arden. Drew is blown away by an 18th-century mansion on the edge of the Yorkshire Moors, and goes deep below ground at a Liverpool cathedral to unearth religious artefacts. S9, Ep2
Leominster. Drew is in Leominster where he sees an incredible private garden. And, he goes to one of the UK's last Brass Foundries, taking a chance on some unique containers. S9, Ep3
Branching Out. Drew heads to a Kent antiques emporium specialising in unusual European antiques, and indulges in 1940s nostalgia at a home front museum in South West Wales. S9, Ep4
James Braxton and Raj Bisram are on the last leg of their trip. They head to auction in Somerset - which one of them will make the biggest profit? S14, Ep20
Catherine and Paul are partnered up together for the first time and are driving around Northern Ireland and Scotland looking for antique treasure. They start in Portrush. S12, Ep1
Mechanical music expert Steve works on a treasured piece of furniture. Plus, Julie and Amanda work together to restore 'Jill', a well-loved land army doll. S6, Ep9
Anneka Rice & Antony Cotton. Angus clears the family home of TV icon Anneka Rice and looks at a collection of quirky items at soap star Antony Cotton's Lancashire cottage. S2, Ep1
Barbara has been looking for her brother for 20 years. Sharon, adopted against the backdrop of racial tension, now seeks her birth mother. S8, Ep3
For years, Angela thought she was adopted, before learning it was in fact her sister. Bronwen longs to find the son she put up for adoption as a baby. S8, Ep5
Sarah Moore saves three items from the dump and transforms them into valuable pieces. She then sells them and returns the profits to those who ditched them. S11, Ep3
In Lancashire, Drew visits a sprawling salvage yard that yields a huge haul of unique items. Next, at an auction house, Drew faces off against other dealers in a bidding war. S13, Ep14
Raj Bisram and Natasha Raskin Sharp search for items in Chilham. Plus, Natasha learns about the coastal defences built to ward off Napoleon and his forces. S20, Ep23

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Claire Foy. As Claire Foy delves into her family tree, the personal testimony she uncovers reveals stories of tragedy and an accusation of murder. S19, Ep2

programmes.show_description: Josh Widdicombe. Comedian Josh Widdicombe journeys through his extraordinary family history. He discovers an ancestor's very personal access to King Charles I. S18, Ep1

The Mis-Guided Spirit. It's a race against time for the team to help prevent an evil force from taking over a spiritually open woman in her Hampshire home. S6, Ep12
The Room Of Doom. Ross and Natasha's dream home becomes a nightmare as paranormal activity threatens their plans to start a family. The team steps in to help. S7, Ep1
